TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ulay2, title = Ulay2, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ulay2} }

S.FORM: alang Ulay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 45 buwan, 210 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%.

alang Ulay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 45 buwan, 210 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%.
S.PHON: alaŋ ulaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%.
